summary: Spec closeout review approved for GH-105 closeout branch base a10aff5544221b8eb28b946013e678689da1136e. PR #127 already merged the Core-only structured result/failure envelope slice, and this closeout-only change records terminal carrier evidence without changing runtime behavior.

Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because there is no `tools/` directory and `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` are absent. Issue closeout and FR #95 closeout audit remain pending until this post-merge carrier sync is merged.
